intro: Win the game or lose everything.
description:
Enter a controlled nightmare where every challenge is designed to push you to your limits. You are one of many contestants trapped inside a secret survival facility, forced to take part in a chain of deadly trials. Under constant surveillance and surrounded by unpredictable opponents, you must stay alert, act carefully, and avoid even the smallest mistake.
   
Go through a series of intense stages, each with its own rules, mechanics, and hidden threats. Complete precision-based tasks, endure dangerous environments, and adjust quickly to shifting conditions. Whether it’s timing challenges or strategic group encounters, every stage becomes harder and demands faster thinking and smarter choices.

Key Features:
- Hardcore Survival Minigames — A collection of intense challenges inspired by deadly trials, each with unique mechanics and rules.
- Iconic Game Modes — Red Light – Green Light, Honeycomb, Tug of War, Glass Bridge, Cookie Stage, Glass Squares, and more.
 - Advanced NPC & Guard System — NPC contestants run, panic, and die in real time, while guards detect, chase, and eliminate players.
 - Progression & Missions — Unlock new stages, routes, and tasks through a branching mission system.
 - Realistic Physics & Death System — Detailed animations, ragdoll physics, and impactful reactions to every mistake.
 - Interactive Mechanics — Cut shapes freely, balance across dangerous paths, and face physics-based challenges.
 - Dark Atmosphere — Bright arenas combined with cold lighting, sharp shadows, and brutal, bloody outcomes.

Survive each trial, master every stage, and fight your way out of the facility alive.
